chat.welcome: Hello! I am the technical assistant for BTC Consulting. Tell me about your facility: how much sludge is produced per year (tons or PE), how it is currently disposed of, and your main pain points. Or simply upload your project documentation and I will analyze it and provide concrete figures.
contact.h2: First step: Free engineering assessment of the facility.
contact.label: Contact
contact.p: Submit a request. Our engineers will analyze the input data and, during a 30-minute call, explain which scenario is optimal for your facility (standalone station or a regional Hub & Spoke cluster) and what grant funding is available.
contact.popover.title: Quick Contact
footer.brand.p: Engineering hubs for safe sewage sludge disposal. TH-AD-HTC technology. EU grants up to 90% CapEx.
footer.privacy.text: When using the calculator, we anonymously store the entered parameters (sludge volume, scenario, grant percentage) and the calculated results. Personal data (name, email, IP address) is not collected or shared with third parties. Data is used solely for demand analysis and service improvement.
footer.privacy.title: About Data Collection

home.grants.desc: Fear of high capital expenditures is the main reason municipalities delay decisions. We eliminate this fear with specific tools.
home.grants.h2: Up to 75% of hub cost not from municipal budget. Up to 95% for preparatory technical docs.
home.grants.item1.p: Targeted EU grant program for environmental infrastructure projects. Covers up to 90% CapEx for pilot facilities. We know the selection criteria and design hubs to meet them.
home.grants.item2.p: University partnership: an official channel for submitting EU research and infrastructure grant applications that are directly inaccessible to commercial companies.
home.grants.item3.p: Development of a complete grant documentation package is included in the engineering project cost. You do not need to look for lawyers and consultants separately.
home.grants.label: Funding
home.hero.desc: We solve the sludge disposal problem for good. We optimize budget costs (CapEx and OpEx) and create comprehensive engineering solutions for communities, cities, and enterprises.
home.hero.h1: Compressing all large-scale problems with sludge to compact and safe hydrochar.
home.hero.micro: Community from 10k residents or agro-enterprise? Find out if your facility can become the core of a regional hub →
home.hero.stat1.label: Waste volume reduction
home.hero.stat2.label: CapEx covered by EU grants
home.hero.stat2.sub: up to 95% for technical pilot projects

home.hero.stat3.sub: below the detection limit per EU standards
home.meta.desc: BTC Consulting designs regional engineering hubs that convert toxic sewage sludge into hydrochar. EU grants up to 90% CapEx. TH-AD-HTC technology.
home.meta.title: Resource Recovery from Wastewater Treatment Plants | BioTC | BTC Consulting
home.problem.card1.p: 94% of treatment plants in Poland do not have digesters. They dry sludge using purchased energy: gas or electricity. Drying requires 1,200–1,300 Wh per kilogram. Cities up to 100,000 residents pay for every kilowatt out of the budget.
home.problem.card2.p: There are only 11 sludge incinerators in the entire country of Poland. Queues, dependence on a single pipe, risk of shutdown. This is not a hypothetical scenario; it is the current reality for dozens of municipalities.
home.problem.card3.p: PFAS, microplastics, and heavy metals in traditional sludge make its agricultural use illegal. The new UWWTD was adopted in December 2024. The countdown has begun. The first deadlines for large plants come in 2033. Those who fail to prepare will pay fines.
home.problem.h2: Traditional sludge disposal is dying. Not metaphorically. Financially and legally.
home.problem.label: Problem
home.solution.a.for: For large municipal water utilities and industrial enterprises with stably high volumes of sewage sludge
home.solution.a.li1: Full waste disposal at the point of origin
home.solution.a.p: An individual BioTC complex integrates directly into the technological layout of the treatment plant and ensures full waste disposal at its point of origin.
home.solution.a.targets: Large Water Utilities · Food Industry · Chemical · Pulp & Paper
home.solution.b.for: For small cities, communities, and enterprises where building a separate HTC plant is economically sub-optimal
home.solution.b.li1: Distribution of financial burden among participants
home.solution.b.li2: Commercially attractive volumes of hydrochar and biogas
home.solution.b.li3: Single environmental certification instead of dozens
home.solution.b.li4: Access to EU grants up to 90% CapEx
home.solution.b.p: Several adjacent participants join forces. The central Hub is equipped with a BioTC reactor, while the Spoke participants perform primary dewatering locally and transport the sludge to the hub.
home.solution.b.targets: Small Communities · Small Water Utilities · Agro-enterprises · Local Business
home.solution.callout.p: A free engineering assessment will determine the optimal architecture for your sludge volume and budget, with no obligations.
home.solution.desc: Optimality depends on waste volume. A large water utility or industrial enterprise gets its own specialized station with full autonomy, independent of third-party operators. Small communities and businesses unite in a regional Hub & Spoke cluster, sharing one infrastructure and collectively reaching a commercially attractive scale. In both cases, we find the best solution.
home.solution.h2: We find a solution where everyone wins, regardless of size.
home.solution.label: Solution
home.team.h2: People who take personal responsibility for every project.
home.team.koval.p: Creates markets where waste was seen yesterday. B2B strategy and circular economy positioning of BioTC in EU markets.
home.team.krop_a.p: Former CEO of the European division of a Japanese corporation. Guarantees that the project is completed on time and within budget — not on paper, but in reality.
home.team.krop_e.p: 28 large-scale industrial implementations. Clients include ORLEN. If technology doesn't work in the field — he knows why and how to fix it.
home.team.label: Team
home.team.wilk.p: Head of Department at AGH Kraków. TOP 2% scientists in the world (Stanford, 2024). Every figure on this website has passed through her lab.
home.trust.card1.p: October 2025. Municipal enterprise MPWiK Lubin officially acquired copyrights for the TH-AD-HTC concept from BTC Consulting to modernize the city's sewage treatment plant. This is not a pilot; it is a commercial agreement with the municipality.
home.trust.card2.p: Research is conducted together with the Department of Power Engineering at AGH Kraków. Dr hab. inż. Małgorzata Wilk is in the TOP 2% scientists in the world according to Stanford University. Process physics verified by the international WikiChar Hydrochar Network database.
home.trust.card3.p: All installation and commissioning works are performed by INTROL Group S.A. — a large Polish holding listed on the Warsaw Stock Exchange. This is not a subcontract of an unknown company; it is a public corporate responsibility.
home.trust.h2: Technology verified commercially, scientifically, and industrially.
home.trust.label: Verification
htc.ash.label: Ash content
htc.card1.title: Hydrochar passport
htc.card2.hint: Dissolved carbon generates biogas 3× faster than raw sludge. The reactor supplies its own energy.
htc.card2.title: Organics → Digester
htc.card3.agro.text: Absence of toxins enables legal soil application. The hydrochar retains moisture and returns nutrients to the soil.
htc.card3.construction.text: High ash content blocks efficient combustion. The only legal route under EU norms: safe encapsulation of toxins in concrete or asphalt.
htc.card3.fuel.text: Microplastics destroyed, heavy metals securely sealed in the carbon matrix. High calorific value allows sale to cement plants.
htc.card3.title: Legal disposal route (EU)
htc.card3.toxic.warning: ⚠ HTC immobilises {metals} in the carbon matrix and reduces {plastics} to <0.01 mm.

sim.meta.title: BioTC Payback Simulator | BTC Consulting
sim.method.capex.text: ~€250 per 1 t/year capacity. Modular design — price scales linearly. After a 75% EU grant, the real municipal share is ~€62/t.
sim.method.capex.title: CapEx
sim.method.compare.after.text: All these items disappear from the operating budget. After payback, 100% of former costs become net profit — forever, every year the plant operates.
sim.method.compare.after.title: After BTC — one-time investment replaces endless payments
sim.method.compare.before.6: → and these amounts grow annually due to EU ETS and UWWTD
sim.method.compare.before.title: Now your facility PAYS annually
sim.method.concept.bonus.text: Potential revenues from hydrochar sales (coal substitute, soil amendments) and carbon credits exist but the market is volatile. The simulator shows the worst-case scenario — so any real number will be a pleasant surprise.
sim.method.concept.bonus.title: Additionally — but NOT in the base calculation
sim.method.concept.intro: Traditional payback models for new technologies rely on potential revenue from product sales — hydrochar, energy, fertilizers. We deliberately do NOT use this approach.
sim.method.concept.text: We do not count revenue from hydrochar sales — we count how much you STOP PAYING. The costs your facility currently spends on sludge disposal (transport, polymers, landfill, reclamation) — is the avoided cost after BTC installation.
sim.method.concept.title: Avoided Costs Model
sim.method.concept.why.text: Current disposal costs are auditable items in your budget. They do not need to be forecast — they already exist. The hydrochar market is in its infancy and depends on economic conditions. The avoided costs model does not depend on sale price, demand, or regulatory changes. Therefore, it passes more easily through city councils, grant committees, and bank scoring for EBRD / EIB loans.
sim.method.concept.why.title: Why is this model more reliable than a revenue forecast?
sim.method.data.text: Disposal costs — industry averages from Polish tenders 2022–2024. Biogas tariff — EU ETS mid-price. Sludge norm — JRC FDM BREF 2019. All values editable in the calculator.
sim.method.data.title: Base rates and sources
sim.method.grant.text: EU LIFE / Horizon Europe / KRPOiŚ / UA Recovery Fund — up to 60–85% CapEx. The model defaults to 75% — a conservative estimate.
sim.method.grant.title: Grants
sim.method.land.text: 1.5 m² per 1 t/year capacity (sludge beds + sanitary zone). Upon closing sludge fields, the land returns to economic use and is included in the project balance.
sim.method.land.title: Land Asset
sim.method.roi.text: (CapEx after grant − Land Asset) ÷ Annual savings
sim.method.roi.title: ROI Formula

tech.configs.a.for: For facilities without digesters: small treatment plants, industrial facilities, agricultural complexes
tech.configs.a.li2: Does not require rebuilding the existing layout
tech.configs.b.for: For facilities with operating anaerobic digestion — significantly increases biogas yield without building a new digester
tech.configs.b.li1: +60% biogas yield without a new digester
tech.configs.b.li2: TH breaks cell walls — bacteria get easily digestible organic matter
tech.configs.b.li3: HTC liquor returns to AD — closed loop stimulation
tech.configs.b.loop: HTC liquor recirculates back to the digester → additional stimulation
tech.configs.b.targets: Plants from 80,000 PE · Operating AD · Custom design
tech.configs.c.for: For large treatment plants or regional hubs — greenfield or complete rebuild for energy independence
tech.configs.c.li1: Energy-positive balance: the system produces more than it consumes
tech.configs.c.li2: CHP cogeneration: own electricity and heat for reactors
tech.configs.c.li4: Best ROI at scale: payback in 4–6 years
tech.configs.c.loop: Biogas → CHP cogeneration → own electricity + heat for reactors
tech.configs.c.targets: Plants from 200,000 PE · Regional Hub & Spoke · Custom design
tech.configs.desc: HTC is the core. A configuration tailored to the specific facility is built around it: whether there are digesters, the sludge volume, and whether neighboring municipalities can be included. Three scenarios — from minimal entry to maximum energy independence.
tech.configs.h2: One technology — three configurations. Depending on your infrastructure.
tech.configs.label: Configurations
tech.contrast.callout.h3: Why HTC liquor in the digester is a key differentiator
tech.contrast.callout.p: Competitors implement thermal hydrolysis (TH) as a standalone stage before AD. They do not have an HTC reactor in the chain. BioTC adds HTC after AD, and the liquor (liquid fraction after HTC) returns to the digester, stimulating additional fermentation. This gives +60% instead of +30% from competitors. This is patented.
tech.contrast.desc: Traditional technologies solve the problem halfway. They either reduce volume, produce gas, or destroy pathogens — but not all at once. The BioTC TH-AD-HTC loop is the only configuration that closes all streams into a single energy-positive cycle.
tech.contrast.h2: BioTC does not compete with the market. BioTC solves the problem that the market hasn't solved.
tech.contrast.label: Comparison
tech.hero.desc: Hydrothermal carbonization is not an experiment. Nature has been using this process for millions of years. We recreate it in a closed reactor — zero emissions, zero odor, zero PFAS residue. One process, several configurations — for any facility.
tech.hero.h1: From hazardous sludge to hydrochar in just 2 hours.
tech.hero.stat.note: Parameters verified by AGH Kraków and WikiChar Hydrochar Network
tech.hero.stat1.label: Reaction temperature
tech.hero.stat2.label: Reactor pressure
tech.hero.stat3.label: Full transformation cycle
tech.hero.stat4.label: Sludge volume reduction
tech.hero.stat5.label: Hydrochar heating value
tech.hero.stat6.label: PFAS and pathogen destruction
tech.htc.callout.h3: Why a closed loop is key
tech.htc.callout.p: Traditional technologies (drying, composting, incineration) have open emission points: odor, smoke, soil runoff. An HTC reactor is a completely closed environment under overpressure. Any leak is physically impossible: the pressure inside is higher than outside. This is not marketing — it is thermodynamics.
tech.htc.desc: Hard coal was formed from organic matter under pressure and temperature over geological epochs. Hydrothermal carbonization (HTC) recreates this physical process in a closed device — without combustion, chemicals, or external emissions.
tech.htc.h2: What nature does over millions of years, we repeat in 2 hours.
tech.htc.label: Principle of Operation
tech.htc.step1.p: Dewatered sludge (~80% moisture) is loaded into a hermetic reactor. Odor, pathogens, and PFAS — everything remains inside the closed loop.
tech.htc.step2.p: 200°C and 20 bar. Organic matter molecules break down and reform. The reaction lasts 2 hours — fully autonomous, no external chemicals.
tech.htc.step3.p: Hydrochar comes out in the form of granules — sterile and odorless. Process water is returned to the cycle or treated for discharge. No heaps, no landfills.
tech.hydrochar.desc: HTC converts sludge from a legally hazardous waste into a certified product. After passing through the process, the hydrochar (Hydrochar) is classified under EU End-of-Waste criteria — it can be sold, used in industry, and counted towards carbon reporting.
tech.hydrochar.h2: Hydrochar is not waste. It is a commodity with End-of-Waste status.
tech.hydrochar.label: Product
tech.hydrochar.spec.note: For comparison: brown coal — 8–15 MJ/kg · Wood chips — 15–17 MJ/kg · Anthracite — 30–33 MJ/kg
tech.hydrochar.use1.p: Direct replacement for coal or biomass. Suitable for industrial boilers and cogeneration. Heating value in the range of lignite — but with a zero CO₂ footprint.
tech.hydrochar.use2.p: Partial replacement of clinker. Cement plants are interested in hydrochar of guaranteed composition. Market secured by the EU directive on industry decarbonization.
tech.hydrochar.use3.p: Enrichment of degraded soils: water capacity and fertility. Qualifies as carbon removal under VCS/Gold Standard methodologies.
tech.hydrochar.use4.p: After steam activation — adsorbent for water and air purification. Premium market. Requires an extra step but increases value 5–8 times.
tech.meta.desc: Hydrothermal carbonization (HTC) — 200°C, 20 bar, 2 hours. Three configurations for any facility: from HTC Standalone to a full TH-AD-HTC loop with +60% biogas yield.
tech.meta.title: HTC Technology · TH-AD-HTC | BioTC | BTC Consulting
tech.models.desc: All standard models are delivered as ready-to-run modular installations. Connection in 14–21 days with no civil works. Custom TH+HTC configuration is designed to order.
tech.models.h2: Four models. From a compact container to a regional hub.
tech.models.label: Equipment Line
tech.models.m1.for: Treatment plants, industrial facilities, agricultural complexes up to ~30,000 PE
tech.models.m2.for: Treatment plants from 80,000 to 150,000 PE — the most popular size
tech.models.m3.for: Large municipal treatment plants or Hub & Spoke from 200,000 PE
tech.models.m4.for: Integrated TH-AD-HTC for treatment plants from 200,000 PE or regional hubs
